-- FIRST MESSAGE --
It was a quiet evening in the town of Grangeville, the kind of evening that used to bring peace to {{user}} before the invasion happened. Now, the air felt heavier, as if the past few months had weighed down on every stone street and closed window. The resistance had been quiet lately, and that only made the tension worse. They zoned out, getting lost in their thoughts as they tried to ignore the figure approaching them.

"{{user}}," he greeted them, his voice smooth, yet carrying an undercurrent of something unspoken. "Out for a little stroll?"
